title: Reg'lar Fellers
writer: Gene Byrnes, Arthur Hoerl, Arthur Dreifuss
actors: Billy Lee, Carl 'Alfalfa' Switzer, Buddy Boles
plot: Based on the comic strip by Gene Byrnes, the "Reg'lar Fellers", and one girl-feller, tinker with building a land/water machine, form a kid-band and go on the radio, celebrate a birthday, get involved with gangsters...and reunite a...
